name: Cloud Instance Metadata API Access - IMDS Credential Theft
description: Detects access to cloud instance metadata APIs (169.254.169.254) for temporary credential extraction. Covers curl, wget, PowerShell, and programmatic IMDS access on AWS, Azure, and GCP.
note: For cloud-native detection: AWS CloudTrail event.action: 'GetCallerIdentity' with sourceIPAddress: 169.254.169.254
